vocab.meaning: những vật dụng thiết yếu cơ bản nhất
vocab.example: I prefer to travel light, so I usually only carry the bare essentials like my keys and phone.
I try to avoid carrying bulky items because they make commuting on public transport quite a hassle.
A portable power bank is a permanent fixture in my bag to ensure my phone never runs out of juice.

vocab.meaning: làm bừa bộn, lấp đầy bằng những thứ linh tinh
vocab.example: I regularly clean out my backpack so that old receipts and wrappers don't clutter up the compartments.
I'm always extra cautious with items of high monetary value, such as my designer wallet or laptop.

vocab.meaning: đồ dùng phù hợp với thời tiết
vocab.example: In this unpredictable climate, I always make sure to pack weather-appropriate gear like a compact umbrella.

vocab.meaning: đồ dùng cá nhân (thường dùng trong văn cảnh trang trọng)
vocab.example: I keep all my personal effects in a small pouch to make switching between different bags much easier.

vocab.meaning: trong tầm tay, dễ dàng lấy được
vocab.example: I keep my commuter card in the front pocket of my jacket so it's always within easy reach at the station.
I carry an all-purpose pocket tool because you never know when you might need to fix something on the go.

vocab.meaning: phương án dự phòng (nghĩa bóng: vật dụng dự phòng)
vocab.example: Carrying a small amount of physical cash is my backup plan in case the digital payment systems fail.
